2604.28001.title: A Pattern Language for Resilient Visual Agents
2604.28001.paper_summary: Integrating multimodal foundation models into enterprise ecosystems presents a fundamental software architecture challenge. Architects must balance competing quality attributes: the high latency and non-determinism of vision language action (VLA) models versus the strict determinism and real-time performance required by enterprise control loops. In this study, we propose an architectural pattern language for visual agents that separates fast, deterministic reflexes from slow, probabilistic supervision. It consists of four architectural design patterns: (1) Hybrid Affordance Integration, (2) Adaptive Visual Anchoring, (3) Visual Hierarchy Synthesis, and (4) Semantic Scene Graph.
2604.28001.paper_summary_zh: 整合多模態基礎模型進入企業生態系統提出了一個基本的軟體架構挑戰。<lb/>架構師必須平衡相互競爭的品質屬性：視覺語言行動（VLA）模型的高延遲和非確定性與企業控制迴路所需的嚴格確定性和即時性能。<lb/>在這項研究中，我們提出了一種視覺代理的架構模式語言，將快速的確定性反應與緩慢的概率監督分開。<lb/>它由四個架構設計模式組成：（1）混合可供性整合，（2）自適應視覺錨定，（3）視覺層次合成，以及（4）語義場景圖。
2604.28001.author: Habtom Kahsay Gidey et.al.
2604.28001.authors: Habtom Kahsay Gidey, Alexander Lenz, Alois Knoll
